subject: What's up?
body:
Hi,

Have any time to talk tomorrow, or over the weekend?

Your assistant called me when I was on a research+business trip to
Asia so I didn't get her message till I returned a few days ago.

Monday I'm going away for a couple weeks on a vacation w/ my family
and will have erratic email and cellphone access.

However, needless to say I remain VERY interested in seeing an AGI
project get funded in some form ...

Let me know when would be a good time to talk!  I can talk during my
vacation as well, w/ some advance planning...

thx
ben

-- 
Ben Goertzel, PhD
CEO, Novamente LLC and Biomind LLC
Director of Research, SIAI
ben@goertzel.org

"Nothing will ever be attempted if all possible objections must be
first overcome " - Dr Samuel Johnson
